scripts.e2e:serial: npm run e2e:chrome && npm run e2e:firefox
scripts.e2e:chrome: node scripts/build-bundled.js --mode=e2e && node scripts/with-env.js HEADLESS=1 EXT_DIR=dist/bundled-pkg-e2e -- vitest run --config vitest.e2e.config.mjs e2e/chrome.e2e.mjs
scripts.e2e:chrome:headed: node scripts/build-bundled.js --mode=e2e && node scripts/with-env.js EXT_DIR=dist/bundled-pkg-e2e -- vitest run --config vitest.e2e.config.mjs e2e/chrome.e2e.mjs
scripts.e2e:firefox: node scripts/build-bundled.js --mode=e2e && node scripts/with-env.js HEADLESS=1 EXT_DIR=dist/bundled-pkg-e2e -- vitest run --config vitest.e2e.config.mjs e2e/firefox.e2e.mjs
scripts.e2e:firefox:headed: node scripts/build-bundled.js --mode=e2e && node scripts/with-env.js EXT_DIR=dist/bundled-pkg-e2e -- vitest run --config vitest.e2e.config.mjs e2e/firefox.e2e.mjs
scripts.lint: node scripts/check-import-cycles.js && node scripts/build-bundled.js && web-ext lint --source-dir dist/bundled-pkg -i "src/**" && oxlint && oxfmt --check
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.browser.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.chrome.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.worker.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.tools.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.tools-legacy.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.test.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.test-strict.json
